tasks.title: Notification-Service v2: DB-backed notifications
tasks.description: Refactor notification_service.py to write to the notifications table (not JSONB on user). Support all 13 notification types from Phase 6 spec. Each notification gets priority (action_now/soon/fyi), type, title, body, link. Idempotent: dedup by (user_id, type, entity_id) within 1h window. Fire SSE event on create.

tasks.title: SLA-Cron-Job: Deadline-Pruefung + Notifications
tasks.description: Add SLA cron job to scheduler.py. Runs at HIVEMIND_SLA_CRON_INTERVAL (default 3600s). Checks epics where sla_due_at is approaching: 4h before → sla_warning to owner. SLA breached → sla_breach to backup_owner (skip if NULL, notify admins). 24h after SLA → admin fallback notification. All notifications idempotent.

criteria: SLA breach notification to backup_owner or admins

tasks.title: Eskalations-Logik: 3x qa_failed → escalated
tasks.description: Enhance state_machine.py validate_qa_failed_count to automatically transition task to escalated after 3x qa_failed. Create escalation notification to epic owner + admins. Write audit log entry for auto-escalation.

tasks.title: Decision-Request-SLA-Enforcement Cron
tasks.description: Add decision request SLA enforcement to scheduler. Check open decision_requests: 24h → notify owner. 48h → notify backup_owner (skip if NULL). 72h → auto-transition: task blocked→escalated, decision_request state→expired, notify all admins (decision_escalated_admin). All idempotent.

criteria: Decision SLA cron job in scheduler

tasks.title: MCP Tool: hivemind/resolve_decision_request
tasks.description: MCP write tool to resolve an open decision request. Args: decision_request_id, decision, rationale. Sets DR state=resolved, resolved_by, resolved_at. Creates DecisionRecord. Atomically transitions task blocked→in_progress. Owner or Admin allowed.

tasks.title: MCP Tool: hivemind/resolve_escalation
tasks.description: MCP write tool: escalated→in_progress. Admin only. Works for both escalation sources. Resets qa_failed_count to 0. Audit log. Notifies assigned worker.

tasks.title: MCP Tool: hivemind/reassign_epic_owner
tasks.description: Admin write tool to change epic owner_id and/or backup_owner_id. Validates user exists. Audit logging. Notification to new owner.

tasks.title: Triage-Prompt-Generator for UNROUTED Items
tasks.description: Add triage prompt enhancement to PromptGenerator. Loads unrouted triage items, available epics, generates routing recommendation prompt with confidence scores.

criteria: Loads unrouted items and epic context

tasks.title: Notification-Retention-Cron
tasks.description: Daily cron job at 03:10 UTC. Deletes read notifications older than NOTIFICATION_RETENTION_DAYS (90). Deletes unread older than NOTIFICATION_UNREAD_RETENTION_DAYS (365). Config in Settings.

tasks.title: Decision-Request-Dialog (Frontend)
tasks.description: Vue 3 modal for decision requests. Options A/B/C display, SLA timer, option select + rationale, MCP resolve call. Reka UI Dialog.

tasks.title: Eskalations-Ansicht in Triage Station (Frontend)
tasks.description: ESCALATED category in triage station. Priority by SLA breach. Admin resolve button. Escalation reason display.

tasks.title: SLA-Timer Component (Frontend)
tasks.description: Animated countdown component. Green >4h, amber 1-4h, red <1h/breached. Reusable on epics and DRs.

tasks.title: Notification Tray: Action Queue Grouping (Frontend)
tasks.description: Tray grouped into ACTION NOW/SOON/FYI. Entry: type, time, reason, action. Mark read. Bell badge. SSE updates.

tasks.title: Backup-Owner-Anzeige + Edit (Frontend)
tasks.description: Backup owner on epic cards and DR views. Admin edit via inline select. MCP reassign call.

tasks.title: Notification REST Endpoints + Router
tasks.description: GET /api/notifications (paginated, filterable), PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read, GET /api/notifications/unread-count. Auth required.
